form.formComment: Last run finished tenth of 11 runners at this track on March 18 over 4200m, on slow going 30 len behind Drop with 66kg at $8.60. Before that won by 6 len Maure-de-Bretagne on February 8 over 3800m on heavy going defeating L'ami De Longhor with 67kg in a steeplechase. Finds a nice race and can bounce back.

form.formComment: Resuming today after four months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Fontainebleau December 9 over 3600m. Previously first up; 4 of 11 starters at Fontainebleau November 6 over 3550m, slow track; 12 len behind Lucie Des Pictons with 69kg at $32. The one to beat on best form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation came from midfield; finished sixth of 11 starters at Durtal on February 1 over 4000m, on rain affected going; a 0.0 len behind L'aureole carrying 69kg. First up last campaign finished third of 7 runners at Maure-de-Bretagne on November 16 over 3800m, 9 len behind Borvo with 65kg. Sure to make presence felt.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 6 of 11 runners at Pau January 23 over 3800m, on heavy track; 38 len behind Lagon Bleu with 67.5kg at $96. form.formComment: Last start came from midfield; ran last at Bordeaux on March 10 over 3900m, 16 len behind Zarakhan carrying 71kg at $19. Race before made some head-way from midfield; finished ninth of 12 starters at Pau on February 6 over 4100m, in the wet; 37 len behind Exciting Hunt carrying 63kg at $14. Must be a chance in this scenario.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 57 days. Resumed from a spell and failed to finish in a hurdle at Pau. At only start last preparation finished seventh of 13 runners at Agen on November 24 over 4200m, in the wet; 30 len behind North Way with 67kg. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 62 days. Last outing finished fourth of 9 starters at Pau on February 3 over 4000m, in the wet; 13 len behind Lenza Conti with 64kg at $7.10.
